creator: wblock@FreeBSD.org
text: Replaceable elements were formerly shown in italic to indicate to the user that they should be replaced. The current HTML does not do this. Example: http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/fdp-primer/book.html#preface-conventions In the line that says "man -k keyword", keyword should be in italic. The HTML source does not make "keyword" a separate class: man -k keyword How-To-Repeat: View http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/fdp-primer/book.html#preface-conventions
